meaning: n.女资助人,女赞助者,女主顾
examples: She was Athena, goddess of wisdom and knowledge and patroness of Athens.
The image of the Patroness of the Church was wrenched out of the porch centuries ago.
You had better neglect your relations, than run the risk of offending your patroness.
Until now she has been all mystique: bride in a family of martyrs, patroness of the disadvantaged, goddess of Indian secularism.
